title: Tier 3: Scope prefix overlap detection
description: Add directory prefix overlap detection to scope-lock engine. When two parallel worktrees have overlapping allowed paths (e.g., src/a and src/a/utils), detect the prefix overlap and warn/block. Prevents messy merge conflicts from parallel agents modifying nested paths. Small fix, high value for multi-agent workflows.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
